mentions.note: Manufacturing/AI infrastructure play showing 3 quarters of accelerating growth and improving margins; Siemens $50M partnership validates opportunity; Cramer interested but invited on show for deeper discussion.

AI-native custom manufacturing marketplace digitizing $275B offline TAM. 37% CAGR revenue, accelerating margins via proprietary 13-year outcome data (moat). Siemens $50M partnership embed into millions of users. Reshoring tailwind (40–50% idle US capacity). 45% YTD, 180% 12-month return. High barriers to entry.
